query:
SELECT 
  'book_profiles' as table_name,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_external_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_mirroring
FROM book_profiles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'author_profiles' as table_name,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN photoUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_external_photo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3PhotoUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3_photo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN photoUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3PhotoUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_mirroring
FROM author_profiles;

  SUM(CASE WHEN photoUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_external_photo,

FROM author_profiles;
